raw_consumer_statement:
On XXXX XXXX I called into American Express to dispute a charge of {$690.00} for a hotel charge that we never stayed at. A customer service agent named XXXX with ID # XXXX told me I will not need to worry about the charge, ever. 
Although they would dispute the charge with the vendor, I would not ever have to worry about the charge. 
I have provided everything to them that they have asked for. 
Two weeks later, the charge was back on my billing statement. 
After many calls and disputes, they tell me they will address this for me only to see the charge back on my billing statement. 
Bottom line, they have told me that I will never have to worry about or pay the charge I am disputing, but they turn around and keep putting the charge back on my account. 
They will not do anything about the dispute now and hang up on me when I try to address it. 
I have been with them for XXXX years, never late on a payment, and this is how they treat me.
